vocab.simpleEn: uncertainty because something is not clear
vocab.simpleZh: 因为不清楚而产生的不确定。
vocab.exampleEn: Ambiguity in instructions can lead to mistakes.
vocab.exampleZh: 指令不明确可能会导致错误。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use ambiguity for instructions, policies, communication, and data.
vocab.upgradeZh: ambiguity 适合指令、政策、沟通和数据类话题。

cycle.summaryEn: Learn useful word partnerships so your English sounds more natural.
cycle.summaryZh: 学习常用搭配，让英语听起来更自然。

frame.useEn: Use this to answer clearly and naturally.
frame.useZh: 用来让口语回答更清楚自然。

meaningEn: This writing word helps Becky build stronger IELTS paragraphs and ideas.
meaningZh: 这个写作词可以帮助 Becky 写出更强的雅思段落和观点。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "ambiguity" using What I mean is...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "ambiguity" 和 我的意思是... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
